current_focus: Validated Flash parameter and JSON metadata schema changes; Windows artifact rebuild pending wine64

progress.description: Implemented per-chunk Flash VADER parameters, fixed run-level metadata, metadata-preserving repair/replay paths, and CFG scale naming across 14 Python files. Baseline commit 32d2a30 exists; implementation changes remain uncommitted. Syntax, imports, metadata merge, legacy CFG compatibility, and docstring checks pass.

decisions.cpu_support: Not a target; preserve existing no-GPU branch without additional CPU handling.
decisions.flashinfer: Do not install flashinfer; retain GUI option and existing tts_engine code unchanged.
decisions.gpu_detection: Use existing nvidia-smi presence check only; no GPU-generation tiering.
decisions.cuda_target: Use torch 2.7.1 and torchaudio 2.7.1 with cu128 index when NVIDIA GPU is detected.
decisions.flash_json_schema: Store num_steps, time_shift_tau, and backend in first _metadata tts_params; store VADER-adjusted exaggeration, cfg_scale, and temperature per chunk.
decisions.microbatching: Keep ENABLE_MICRO_BATCHING, ENABLE_VADER_MICRO_BATCHING, and ENABLE_BATCH_BINNING disabled.
decisions.legacy_cfg: Read cfg_weight only as compatibility input, normalize it to cfg_scale, and never write cfg_weight.

next_tasks: Run build/windows/build_linux.sh on host with wine64 available
Review and commit uncommitted implementation changes when commit is requested
Optionally validate first launch on Windows RTX 5070 hardware
open_questions: Windows installer rebuild unavailable on current host because wine64 is missing.
Windows RTX 5070 runtime smoke test unavailable because target hardware is not available.
notes: Do not modify Linux CUDA lookup in modules/tts_engine.py or GUI flashinfer dropdown. Current source changes are uncommitted; existing build/windows/output artifact was not rebuilt after them.
